qualifiedContractFamilies.summary: Governed receipts, kernel checkpoints, and inclusion proofs form the root evidentiary contract.
Settlement reconciliation, payout, and settlement instruction/receipt artifacts remain linked to governed receipt truth.
Underwriting, exposure, facility, bond, loss-lifecycle, and capital artifacts are partner-reviewable economic contracts rather than internal-only state.
Liability provider, quote, bind, claim, dispute, adjudication, payout, and settlement artifacts are surfaced as governed partner contracts.

degradedPathRule.summary: Compatibility or degraded passthrough remains explicitly non-authoritative for partner economic workflows.

constraints: This matrix proves contract packaging and local exercise, not broad partner adoption.
The partner contract package remains bounded to currently qualified governed surfaces.
Degraded or compatibility-only flows are never treated as authoritative partner evidence.
